description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have two jobs: website and android, both running on ubuntu-latest. The website job checks out the code, sets up Node.js 8.x, installs dependencies, builds the website, and deploys it to gh-pages if the push is to the master branch. The android job checks out the code, sets up JDK 1.8, installs NDK 21, installs dependencies, and builds the android project.
